caption: A video sequence shows a political event featuring Narendra Modi and other men. Modi wears a white kurta and a multicolored stole draped over his shoulders. He is seen speaking and gesturing with his hand, while men behind him wear white clothing and red caps. The background consists of a repeated pattern of the lotus logo of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The frames are overlaid with a large orange banner at the top containing the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and the lotus logo. Small text on the sides reads "प्रजाजनमेत्री" and "दिल्ली". A bottom banner includes the phrase "लाइव देखें" followed by social media icons and the handle "/BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across the frames, Modi continues to speak and gesture, while the men behind him remain in position, observing the proceedings.
